summary: GRID_8: all 8 elements of D_4 applied to a BLUE square with YELLOW/GREEN/ORANGE/PURPLE corner labels A,B,C,D. Top row: identity e, rotations r, r^2, r^3 via Rotate about corner. Bottom row: horizontal flip s, vertical flip rs, diagonal / (r^2 s), diagonal \ (r^3 s) via .flip(axis=...). TransformFromCopy spawns each new square from the identity. Bottom Tex notes |D_4| = 8 = 4 rot + 4 refl.
